title: DeleteSchemaVersionsInput
description: DeleteSchemaVersionsInput schema from Amazon Glue API

allOf.description: This is a wrapper structure that may contain the schema name and Amazon Resource Name (ARN).

A version range may be supplied which may be of the format:

  • a single version number, 5

  • a range, 5-8 : deletes versions 5, 6, 7, 8
